description_long: This object is a modern mobile phone with a rectangular, slim profile and rounded corners. The front face is dominated by a smooth, dark screen, likely made of glass, with no visible buttons, suggesting a touch interface. The back appears to be a solid, dark blue or black panel with a small circular camera lens and a flash module positioned near the top left corner. The sides are thin and metallic, with a single button visible on the right edge, likely serving as a power or lock button. The overall design is minimalist and sleek, typical of contemporary smartphones. The device is compact and lightweight, suitable for handheld use in urban environments.
description: A sleek, modern mobile phone with a dark glass front, a blue-black back, and a single rear camera. Minimalist design with one side button and a slim metallic frame.
description_view_0: The left edge of the phone is visible, showing a thin, dark profile with no buttons or features.
description_view_1: The back of the phone is visible, displaying a dark blue-black surface with a single camera lens and flash near the top left.
description_view_2: The front of the phone is visible, featuring a smooth, dark screen with no visible buttons or icons.
description_view_3: The right edge of the phone is visible, showing a thin profile with a single button near the middle.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen is blank or turned off, with no visible icons, wallpaper, or interface elements.
attribute_camera_placement: A single camera lens and flash are located near the top left corner on the back of the phone.
attribute_button_layout: One physical button is visible on the right edge, likely serving as a power or lock button.
